response.justification: Bogdan has strong experience in cloud infrastructure, distributed systems, and microservices—his work at Dunnhumby handling millions of requests/second with low-latency optimization and his Kubernetes/AWS CDK experience demonstrate relevant technical depth for a cloud compute platform. However, he falls significantly short of the minimum 8-year C++ requirement, with only 6 months of C++ work in 2014-2015; his career is JavaScript/TypeScript-focused. Additionally, while he holds senior/staff titles and has taught/mentored, there is limited evidence of formal technical leadership managing engineering teams. The infrastructure expertise partly compensates, but the C++ gap and weak leadership track record make this a marginal fit.
strengths: Deep distributed systems expertise: designed and operated microservices handling millions of requests/second, optimizing for low-latency and high performance
Cloud infrastructure and platform knowledge: hands-on Kubernetes, Docker, AWS CDK, and CI/CD experience; built event-driven and scalable systems
Engineering best practices advocacy: established coding standards, taught TDD and refactoring, organized engineering workshops and mentoring initiatives
concerns: Critical C++ experience gap: only ~6 months of C++ in 2014-2015 versus minimum requirement of 8 years; career centered on JavaScript/TypeScript and D lang
Weak technical leadership evidence: staff/senior titles present but no clear track record of managing or mentoring engineering teams at scale
Cloud platform specialization unclear: while Kubernetes and AWS CDK experience exist, no explicit evidence of designing or operating large-scale cloud compute platforms

key_factors.factor: Technical leadership and team mentoring track record
